name: Photizo Studio
address: 110/12, Ashirwad, Prabhat Road, Lane No. 14, Thorat Colony, Pune, Maharashtra 411004
full_address: 110/12, Ashirwad, Prabhat Road, Lane No. 14, Thorat Colony, Pune, Maharashtra 411004

reviews.text:
My fiancé and I engaged Photizo Studio for our pre-wedding photoshoot. Through recommendation, we approached them. As the wedding season was in full swing, despite the heavily booked dates, I cannot thank enough Alhhadh and his team to fit us in and doing such a great job. I heard they covered a wedding at the same shoot location until 1AM the previous night and the team was ready for our shoot sharp at 5.30 AM the next morning. Alhhadh and Sanil captured our photos. Considering the proximity of our marriage date, they went above and beyond for their customers and delivered us the edited pics within 2 days after the shoot in spite of their tight schedule.

Main highlights from our experience with Photizo:

1. We felt at ease during the photoshoot as the Photizo team was very friendly and accommodating with our requests.
2. They did an excellent job in capturing the morning highlights. The entire team is very talented and worked well with each other. Kudos for the punctuality, patience and prompt reply on our needs
3. The team knew how to take natural angles that made the photos turn out very nice!
4. The final editing is absolutely stunning and not to say their package prices are really reasonable and affordable for the effort they put in. We received many compliments on our pre-wed shoot photos!
5. We like their attitude in experimenting and trying out new ideas and accepting customer feedback.

From start to finish - amazing service!
The professionalism and quality of work is greatly appreciated.
For sure, they deserve my feedbacks and recommendation!!!

We booked Photizo Studios for our pre-wedding shoot and our wedding in February 2020. Right from our first meeting with them where they gave us a detailed explanation about their scope of work to showing up at my each function very much on time , they are extremely professional and punctual! Their emails gave us an exact idea of how many team members would be covering each of our functions keeping in mind what we expected and how we wanted our wedding to be captured!
Details of each of the events were discussed well in advance and all our special requests in terms of getting the deliverables on time or capturing particular moments were met!
We weren’t very camera friendly, but thanks to the Photizo team, they made us so comfortable! It’s because of them we have the  most memorable day of our lives captured in such a beautiful way!
Also, the wedding video teaser is the highlight of all♥️ And that’s something they delivered to us in less than 24 hours since we wanted to have it played at our reception!
They captured it so beautifully and had it delivered for us in such a short time , that we were stunned!

Photizo Studio and the whole team did an excellent job of covering our Munja last month. They came on board like an enthusiastic bunch and captured top class film and photos. Their team was very patient and friendly with little kids and people of all ages at all events. They mingled along like our very own and that helped to capture one of the best moments of our lives! When you are looking forward to capture important and special moments in your life, you need someone who will work with you hand in hand rather than just delivering what is quoted on paper. Alhaad and his team worked with us and made this event a huge success. Their hard work is showing up and appreciated when your friends and relatives are impressed and giving amazing reviews about the film and photos!

They have been very patient and open to suggestions through out the whole process. I would definitely recommend them and and like to do business with them again! All the best and Thank you to everyone at Photizo Studios.

Photizo is a team of extremely hard working and talented photographers. We had an amazing experience working with them. They were just able to capture all our true emotions in each and every one of the wedding pictures. After the wedding, we were actually very overwhelmed to choose the final photos. Since every single one of them was breathtakingly captured, it was very difficult to even shortlist them! :-D Thats how amazing our experience was.

Every single member of the team is very kind and friendly. They make you feel very comfortable, especially when the bride and groom are stressed during the wedding. They were always very punctual and well prepared with their equipment. The experience was simply incredible and I would definitely recommend it to any and everyone out there! :-)

Photizo has an amazing team of Photographers and Cinematographers!! My wedding was in 2018 December, they had covered all our beautiful moments without having to instruct them. Alhhad and Sanil made sure that we did not have to bother about the perfect moments being captured. All we did was enjoy our day and Team Photizo ensured that each and every perfect moment was captured for us to relive it whenever we wanted. The Cinematography turned out exceptional, it was worth every penny! Thank you Team Photizo for giving us the reel to experience our perfect day over and over again.

Choosing Photizo was one of the best decisions we made for our wedding. From start to finish, everything was seamless, professional, and joyful. The team has an incredible eye for detail and captured every moment beautifully like the laughter, quiet moments, and all the chaos in between.
Alhhadh, Aniket, and the entire team made us feel completely at ease, and we were truly impressed by how quickly we received all our edited photos and videos! Highly recommend Photizo Studios for anyone looking for an amazing wedding photography team.

Alhhadh, Aniket, and the entire team made us feel completely at ease, and we were truly impressed by how quickly we received all our edited photos and videos! Highly recommend Photizo Studios for anyone looking for an amazing wedding photography team.

My experience with Photizo Studio has been truly good. They were punctual and ensured that all important moments during the functions are captured well and that the bride and the groom are comfortable while they capture amazing candid photos! The final edits are too good!
For sure would recommend them for preserving memories!

10/10 recommend Alhad and his team.
Right from my wedding to my daughter’s naming ceremony , we have trusted Photizo and they have never disappointed us.
Team has a very good understanding of rituals and they nicely capture all the candids.
